reasoning: The ISO27001 control A.5.2 focuses on defining roles and responsibilities, which aligns with Kubernetes RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) mechanisms. These mechanisms ensure that users and service accounts have the appropriate roles and permissions, enforcing the principle of least privilege. The functions generated address key aspects of RBAC, such as preventing the use of cluster-admin bindings, ensuring least privilege, and managing service account tokens. Additionally, configuring OIDC authentication in Kubernetes can be related to enforcing identity and access management policies similar to MFA in cloud environments.
title: Roles and Responsibilities
